name: HP iLO Orchestrator Extension
description: A UO Extension for the HP iLO system.

store_types.Name: HP iLO Cert Store
store_types.StorePathDescription: This should contain the path pointing to the HPiLO instance address, IP or domain name.
store_types.ClientMachineDescription: Should contain a copy of the store path for compatibility reasons but is currently unused.

Properties.Name: InventoryAll
Properties.Description: If true, allows for inventory of additional factory-installed certificates and their chains: `Platform Cert`,`SystemIAK`,`SystemIDevID`, `iLOIDevID/BMCIDevIDPCA`

Properties.Name: IgnoreValidation
Properties.Description: WARNING: Only enable if testing. Used to disable certificate validation checks at the API endpoint. Should be set to false in any production scenario.

Properties.Name: HTTPSCertWaitTime
Properties.Description: The HPiLO API requires the user to wait while the HTTPS Cert CSR is generated. HP suggests a time of 60 seconds, as is the default setting, but it can be adjusted.

EntryParameters.Name: IncludeIP
EntryParameters.Description: Enables the addition of the device IP as a SAN to the CSR during reenrollment. Used particularly during HTTPSCert reenrollment, where it can be set as desired, and should be set to false during all other operations.
